app.title: Lyrics Cultural Analytics Lab
app.subtitle: A light-mode platform for lyrics culture analytics, machine learning, and explainable reporting
safety.title: Copyright-Safe Design
safety.noFullLyrics: This system does not display full lyrics
safety.noFullLyricsDescription: The API, test data, and frontend screens only use metadata, bag-of-words features, and model-derived outputs.
safety.derivedFeaturesOnly: Only bag-of-words features, topics, sentiment scores, style vectors, and aggregate analytics are shown
safety.publicDemoNotice: For public demos, verify dataset licensing and do not add complete lyric text, line-by-line text, or raw text.
charts.drilldownSubtitle: Metadata only; no full lyrics are displayed
errors.noRawLyricsAllowed: Full lyric display is not allowed in this product
pages.topic.coherenceNote: Topic coherence is a simplified estimate using topic scores and representative term stability. It is for demo comparison, not formal research evaluation.
pages.genre.limitations: This baseline uses derived bag-of-words features for workflow demonstration and is not a production music classifier.
pages.demo.title: Demo Mode
pages.overview.storyBody: Start with decade term evolution, compare genre sentiment, then inspect similarity networks to check style boundaries and classifier credibility.
notFound.title: Page not found
workflow.title: Analysis workflow
workflow.subtitle: Follow the data from upload through inspection, cleaning, modeling, and report-ready visualization.
workflow.pageSummary: The platform turns a tabular dataset into a guided analysis flow: schema checks, missingness, cleaning recommendations, modeling readiness, and visual report outputs.
overview.heroTitle: From safe lyric features to explainable cultural analytics
overview.heroBody: Use a focused workflow to inspect data, clean it, compare machine learning methods, and package lyrics culture findings into readable dashboards and reports.
overview.pipelineBody: Current demo data is available for profiling and modeling. Upload wiring can reuse this same workflow contract.
overview.workflowCard: Inspect columns, data types, missingness, duplicates, and cleaning recommendations before running models.
overview.mlCard: Compare logistic regression, decision tree, random forest, SVM, boosting, AdaBoost, voting ensembles, clustering, TF-IDF, and topic modeling.
overview.visualCard: Use dense heatmaps, scatter plots, area trends, and drill-down panels to explore results.
overview.highlightNote: Insights are generated from derived features and aggregate model outputs.
analysis.cleaningSummary: Cleaning preview keeps {{rows}} rows after duplicate review and recommends targeted data-quality checks.
analysis.mlLabSummary: Run and compare classic machine learning methods on TF-IDF vector features, then inspect model structure, feature importance, clustering projections, and topic outputs.
guide.title: Guided Demo Assistant
guide.steps.overviewHero.title: Start with the product story
guide.steps.overviewHero.body: This establishes the platform as copyright-safe lyrics analytics, connecting derived features, ML, explainability, and reports.
guide.steps.overviewStories.title: Show users what to inspect first
guide.steps.overviewStories.body: The system turns model, data quality, topic, and similarity results into evidence-linked story cards with next actions.
guide.steps.stories.title: Analysis Story Builder
guide.steps.stories.body: Task tabs organize Genre classification, Topic evolution, Artist style, Similarity, and Data quality into readable decision summaries.
guide.steps.upload.title: Upload data or use the sample dataset
guide.steps.upload.body: Users can upload artists.csv, songs.csv, and lyric_bow_features.csv. Without upload, the sample dataset powers the full demo.
guide.steps.inspect.title: Inspect schema and quality
guide.steps.inspect.body: Column types, missing values, uniqueness, and category balance are checked before modeling.
guide.steps.clean.title: Read the before / after cleaning effect
guide.steps.clean.body: The cleaning preview explains duplicates, missing values, and recommended fixes so users understand how data is prepared.
guide.steps.lineageStart.title: Data Journey Replay
guide.steps.lineageStart.body: Select one song and follow it from safe metadata through BoW, TF-IDF, topics, model prediction, and final report output.
guide.steps.lineageStart.action: Follow one row end to end
guide.steps.lineageDetail.title: Every step has input and output
guide.steps.lineageDetail.body: Each step explains inputs, outputs, kept fields, excluded fields, and why the transformation matters.
guide.steps.mlComparison.title: Model comparison is more than one score
guide.steps.mlComparison.body: ML Lab compares Accuracy, Macro-F1, baseline, model families, and leakage audit context.
guide.steps.mlTradeoff.title: Model tradeoff map
guide.steps.mlTradeoff.body: High Accuracy does not mean every genre is treated fairly. Macro-F1 shows whether smaller classes are ignored.
guide.steps.tree.title: Decision Tree structure
guide.steps.tree.body: The tree shows split rules, samples, impurity, and class distribution from top to bottom.
guide.steps.cluster.title: Cluster projection and profiles
guide.steps.cluster.body: Cluster projection shows relative distance in TF-IDF/SVD space; representative songs, terms, and topics explain each group.
guide.steps.tfidf.title: TF-IDF weighting
guide.steps.tfidf.body: TF-IDF increases distinctive terms and reduces common terms, creating interpretable features for classification, topics, and similarity.
guide.steps.explainability.title: Explainability Center
guide.steps.explainability.body: This page centralizes feature importance, signed terms, per-class explanation, model disagreement, and error cases.
guide.steps.disagreement.title: Ask why models disagree
guide.steps.disagreement.body: Different predictions for the same held-out song can signal weak features, blurry genre boundaries, or low data support.
guide.steps.similarity.title: Similarity network
guide.steps.similarity.body: The graph links the seed song, shared terms, shared topics, and neighbors so recommendation results have visible reasons.
guide.steps.similarityEvidence.title: Similarity evidence panel
guide.steps.similarityEvidence.body: The side panel shows shared BoW terms, shared topics, and genre match or mismatch, not just a similarity score.
guide.steps.artistNetwork.title: Artist style network
guide.steps.artistNetwork.body: Artist nodes use style uniqueness, genre consistency, and cluster color so artist style is more than a single radar chart.
guide.steps.artistFingerprint.title: Artist fingerprint
guide.steps.artistFingerprint.body: Fingerprints explain topic diversity, sentiment intensity, genre consistency, complexity, and style uniqueness.
guide.steps.evaluationFlow.title: Evaluation path
guide.steps.evaluationFlow.body: Read evaluation in order: split, train-only TF-IDF, model comparison, confusion matrix, and error story.
guide.steps.evaluationMatrix.title: Confusion matrix and per-class metrics
guide.steps.evaluationMatrix.body: The confusion matrix finds repeated genre mistakes; per-class metrics reveal weak classes.
guide.steps.errorStory.title: Error case storyline
guide.steps.errorStory.body: Error stories turn weak classes, confused pairs, retrieval warnings, and advice into readable conclusions.
guide.steps.reports.title: Report Workspace
guide.steps.reports.body: Select insights and generate Markdown plus print-friendly HTML so the analysis can be shared.
guide.steps.licensing.title: Copyright-safe boundary
guide.steps.licensing.body: The platform only shows metadata, BoW, TF-IDF, topics, model outputs, and aggregates. It does not display full lyrics or raw lyric text.
